title: Medical Devices Establishment Licence Unit - Medical Devices & Clinical Compliance Directorate - Regulatory Operations and Regions Branch - Canada.ca
content:
## Medical Devices Establishment Licence Unit

Jeanne Mance Building - Address Locator 1903C 200 Eglantine Driveway - 3rd Floor Ottawa, ON K1A 0K9
